title: Agentic Reinforcement Learning with Disentangled Action-Reasoning Tuning

defines.name: DART
defines.definition: A framework that decouples reasoning and tool-use parameter updates with separate LoRA adapters to reduce gradient interference in agentic reinforcement learning.

defines.name: CEA
defines.definition: A diagnostic framework that decomposes agent performance into individual capability effects and pairwise interaction terms to measure interference between reasoning and tool use.

problem: Shared-parameter joint optimization of reasoning and tool-use behaviors causes gradient misalignment and negative interference that weakens agent performance.
